isolation.boundary: Used only local repo resources, assigned mission evidence path, and port 9849

assertions.title: Server unreachable error handling in TUI

steps.observed: Loaded successfully before outage (conversation/notes views rendered).

steps.action: Stop server on port 9849 and trigger refresh (Ctrl+R) from Notes view
steps.expected: Status bar shows clear unreachable error and TUI does not crash
steps.observed: Screen stopped updating at 12:04:09 with no new unreachable status in this run; subsequent snapshot was identical and process check showed no inbox.py process (app exited).

evidence.network: Server intentionally stopped: no listener on :9849 during outage

assertions.issues: Persistent server outage caused TUI process exit instead of sustained in-app error handling.

assertions.title: API call failure handling in TUI

steps.action: Launch TUI and capture baseline with server running
steps.observed: Loaded with conversation list and normal status text.

steps.action: Trigger refresh, then briefly restart server to induce transient API failure
steps.expected: Failed API call shows status error without crashing app
steps.observed: Status bar showed exact text: "Server unreachable — press Ctrl+R to retry" while UI stayed rendered.
Successfully navigated to Notes tab via click and list rendered (app remained active).

evidence.network: Transient induced outage on :9849 during refresh; health returned after restart

steps.action: Run timed curl calls against /conversations on running server
steps.observed: First run took 6.070614s (HTTP 200), exceeding 3s threshold; later warm runs were faster.

assertions.title: iMessage send and refresh

steps.action: Inspect available iMessage conversations to identify a safe non-user-impact target
steps.expected: Find a dedicated test conversation and send via compose input
steps.observed: Sample conversations were real personal/group contacts; no explicit sandbox/test thread was identified.

steps.expected: Send test iMessage and verify appearance after refresh within 5s
steps.observed: Not executed to avoid sending live messages to real contacts without a designated safe target.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing clearly safe/sandbox iMessage recipient for live send validation.

steps.action: Capture baseline TUI snapshot with no manual refresh
Wait 20 seconds (> default 10s poll interval) with no input
steps.observed: 12:06:41 snapshot showed 380 conversations / 310 unread, indicating automatic update.

evidence.network: No manual refresh action between snapshots

frictions.description: tuistory key simulation for Ctrl+number tab shortcuts was unreliable in this session; switched to click-based tab navigation for interaction checks.
frictions.resolution: Used `tuistory click "Notes" --first` to verify post-error navigability.

frictions.description: curl to localhost failed in this environment while 127.0.0.1 on the same port succeeded.
frictions.resolution: Used http://127.0.0.1:9849 consistently for curl evidence.

blockers.description: No explicitly designated safe/sandbox iMessage destination was available for live send testing.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Enumerated current iMessage conversation sample via API to locate a non-user-impact target; none was clearly safe.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-HARD-009, VAL-REGR-005), 2 failed (VAL-HARD-008, VAL-PERF-002), 1 blocked (VAL-REGR-002).
